channel.title: Microcontact printing; Submerged microcontact printing; Metal patterns;Palladium(II)-thiol complexes; Palladium nanoparticles; Electrolessdeposition on LMI

item.title: Formation and use of palladium(II)-thiol complexes at the surface ofPDMS stamps for the fabrication of high resolution and high densitymetal patterns using soft-lithography techniques
